message:
fix(repr): Handle pointer-to-array types in valueRepr for nested closures

When a nested closure receives a string literal, Zig passes it as
*const [N:0]u8 (pointer to array) rather than []const u8 (slice).
This caused pyRepr to fall through to the generic fallback, producing
Zig array format like '{ 194, 189 }' instead of Python repr.

Add isStringPointer helper to detect pointer-to-array of u8 types
and convert them to slices before passing to stringRepr.

This fixes %r format in closures where the parameter type is anytype.
